childhood.familyBackground: Details of his family background are not widely documented.
childhood.education: Graduated from Seoul National University with a degree in Computer Science. Earned both a master's and Ph.D. in Computer Science from KAIST (Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology).
childhood.earlyLife: Lee Jun-ho's academic path in computer science at Korea's two most prestigious institutions (SNU and KAIST) laid the foundation for his career in technology. He was three years senior to Naver founder Lee Hae-jin at Seoul National University's Computer Science department.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 가정 배경에 대한 구체적 정보는 널리 알려져 있지 않음.
childhood.educationKo: 서울대학교 컴퓨터공학과 졸업. 한국과학기술원(KAIST)에서 전산학 석사 및 박사학위 취득.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 한국 최고의 두 교육기관(서울대, KAIST)에서의 컴퓨터과학 학문 경로가 기술 분야 커리어의 기반을 마련. 서울대학교 컴퓨터공학과에서 네이버 창업자 이해진의 3년 선배.

careerTimeline.event: Worked as a researcher at KAIST's Artificial Intelligence Research Center for one year
Became associate professor at Soongsil University's Department of Computer Science
Founded Search Solution with Naver's 1 billion won investment, jointly developing the 'Nexearch' search engine that powered Naver
careerTimeline.eventKo: 네이버컴의 10억 원 투자로 서치솔루션을 설립, 네이버에 제공할 '넥서치' 검색엔진을 공동 개발

careerTimeline.event: Joined NHN as Chief Technology Officer (CTO), later rising to CAO (2007) and COO (2009)
careerTimeline.eventKo: NHN 최고기술책임자(CTO)로 입사, 이후 CAO(2007년)와 COO(2009년)로 승진

careerTimeline.event: When NHN split into Naver (portal) and NHN Entertainment (gaming), became chairman and board chair of NHN Entertainment
careerTimeline.eventKo: NHN이 네이버(포털)와 NHN엔터테인먼트(게임)로 기업분할 시 NHN엔터테인먼트 회장 겸 이사회 의장으로 취임

personalTraits.knownFor: Computer scientist who co-built Naver's search engine and went on to lead NHN as chairman. A KAIST Ph.D. and former university professor who transitioned from academia to tech entrepreneurship. His 'Nexearch' search engine, developed through Search Solution, became the backbone of Naver, Korea's dominant search portal. After Naver and NHN split in 2013, he took the gaming and technology services side (NHN), building it into a diversified technology company spanning gaming, payments (Payco), cloud computing, and commerce.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 네이버의 검색엔진을 공동 구축하고 NHN 회장으로 이끈 컴퓨터 과학자. KAIST 박사 출신의 전 대학교수에서 기술 기업가로 전환. 서치솔루션을 통해 개발한 '넥서치' 검색엔진이 한국 최대 검색 포털 네이버의 근간이 됨. 2013년 네이버와 NHN 분할 후 게임 및 기술 서비스 부문(NHN)을 맡아 게임, 결제(페이코), 클라우드 컴퓨팅, 커머스를 아우르는 다각화된 기술 기업으로 성장시킴.
